title: 紡がれてゆく夢の煌めき

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Come and get it! Come and get it! We're offering fresh deals on the
freshest carrots around!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And as an extra bonus, buyers will get to join the Team Sirius! Get 'em while they're still here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Are we sure this will attract new members?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Doing nothing at all might work better than this...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But we need to be proactive here! Otherwise the other teams might
get all the good students!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And Brian, if you keep scowling like that, you're gonna scare people
away.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This is just my face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Numerous new students don their uniforms and cross through the
school gates for the first time today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On their faces is a mix of hope and fear as each of them takes their
first steps down this new path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But in all of their eyes, I see nothing but dreams.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I put up all the posters you gave me!

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: All our posters are up too!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
There's some at the gates, the dorm cafeteria, and every last
classroom.

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: This should help us find new teammates in no time!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Not that we really need to find any. We've got more than enough
members to remain active.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, but when we talked about it, we all said we wanted to see
Team Sirius spread its message even further!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Wait a second... why are you wearing your racewear?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Actually, I wanted to ask why you guys aren't wearing yours.
Didn't Gold Ship tell you we were meeting in our racewear?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I meeean, you're the best racer in Japan! Seeing you race around is
sure to grab everyone's attention!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, I... think that makes sense?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, Spe! As our Team Sirius Ambassador, show 'em your run—no,
your Team Sirius spirit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehe, running really does suit her best.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: ...It really does.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: ...It really does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Umamusume run with a dream in their sights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is the job of her trainer and her teammates to help her reach that
dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And once that dream comes true, it becomes the link to the next
dreamer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Come on, everyone! Let's spend our school days together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And together, we'll bring your dream to life!
